I was driving down the road and the front end of the car started to shake.  The power to the car then went out.  The message on the dash said to put it in park and restart so I did.  I was able to get it started, and put it in drive and then it shook again and the power went out.

narrative.headline: What 2024 Ford Bronco owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 67 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (22% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
